member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Registration and login.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthController.Register(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Auth.RegisterRequestDto)
member.summary: Register a new customer account.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthController.Login(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Auth.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: Log in with email and password.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthorsController
member.summary: Manage book authors.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthorsController.GetAll
member.summary: List all authors.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthorsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single author.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthorsController.Create(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Authors.CreateAuthorDto)
member.summary: Create an author. Admin only.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthorsController.Update(System.Int32,BookStoreApi.Dtos.Authors.UpdateAuthorDto)
member.summary: Update an author. Admin only.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.AuthorsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an author. Admin only.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Controllers.BooksController
member.summary: Browse, search, and (for admins) manage books.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.BooksController.GetBooks(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Books.BookQueryParameters)
member.summary: Browse books with optional search, filtering, sorting, and pagination.
member.remarks: Query parameters: page, pageSize, search, categoryId, authorId, minPrice, maxPrice, sortBy (sortBy accepts "title", "price", "publishedDate"; prefix with "-" for descending, e.g. "-price").

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.BooksController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single book's details.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.BooksController.Create(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Books.CreateBookDto)
member.summary: Create a new book. Admin only.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.BooksController.Update(System.Int32,BookStoreApi.Dtos.Books.UpdateBookDto)
member.summary: Update an existing book. Admin only.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.BooksController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a book. Admin only.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Controllers.CategoriesController
member.summary: Manage book categories.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetAll
member.summary: List all categories.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single category.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.CategoriesController.Create(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Categories.CreateCategoryDto)
member.summary: Create a category. Admin only.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.CategoriesController.Update(System.Int32,BookStoreApi.Dtos.Categories.UpdateCategoryDto)
member.summary: Update a category. Admin only.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.CategoriesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a category. Admin only.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Controllers.OrdersController
member.summary: Place orders and view order history.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.OrdersController.Create(BookStoreApi.Dtos.Orders.CreateOrderDto)
member.summary: Place a new order containing one or more books. Requires authentication.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.OrdersController.GetMyOrders
member.summary: Get the current customer's own past orders.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.OrdersController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a specific order. Customers may only view their own; admins may view any.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Controllers.OrdersController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get every order placed by every customer. Admin only.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Dtos.Books.BookQueryParameters
member.summary: Query-string bound parameters for GET /api/books (browsing, searching, filtering, pagination).

member.name: P:BookStoreApi.Dtos.Books.BookQueryParameters.Search
member.summary: Free-text search across title and description.

member.name: P:BookStoreApi.Dtos.Books.BookQueryParameters.SortBy
member.summary: One of: title, price, publisheddate (prefix with "-" for descending, e.g. "-price").

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Dtos.Common.ApiErrorResponse
member.summary: Structured error response returned for every non-2xx result.

member.name: P:BookStoreApi.Dtos.Common.ApiErrorResponse.Errors
member.summary: Field-level validation errors, if any (field name -> list of messages).

member.name: P:BookStoreApi.Dtos.Orders.OrderDto.CustomerEmail
member.summary: Populated for admins viewing all orders; the owner's own listing can ignore it.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Exceptions.BadRequestException
member.summary: Thrown for business-rule violations that are the client's fault. Mapped to HTTP 400.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Exceptions.ConflictException
member.summary: Thrown when a request conflicts with existing state (e.g. duplicate email). Mapped to HTTP 409.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Exceptions.ForbiddenException
member.summary: Thrown when an authenticated user tries to access a resource they don't own. Mapped to HTTP 403.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a requested entity does not exist. Mapped to HTTP 404.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Exceptions.UnauthorizedException
member.summary: Thrown for authentication failures (e.g. bad credentials). Mapped to HTTP 401.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Exceptions.ValidationAppException
member.summary: Thrown for manual/service-level validation failures. Mapped to HTTP 400 with field errors.

member.name: M:BookStoreApi.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddConsistentModelValidationResponses(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Makes built-in [ApiController] model-binding validation errors (e.g. malformed JSON, missing required route/body values) come back in the same ApiErrorResponse shape as every other error in the API.

member.name: T:BookStoreApi.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Catches every unhandled exception in the pipeline and converts it into a clean, structured JSON response. Guarantees the API never leaks stack traces or internal exception details to the client.
